metadata.description: Azure tenant id for Key Vault
Static Web Apps region (fallback eastus2 due to SWA availability)
SQL admin password seeded into Key Vault — rotate after first deploy
Dev-only firewall IP allowlist; empty in staging/prod
Enable SQL threat detection (staging + prod only)
Enable Key Vault purge protection (staging + prod only)
Additional resource tags on top of the defaults
Whether to enable purge protection (staging/prod only)
SQL Database SKU name (S2 default; overridable to S4/P1 for prod upgrade path)
SQL admin password — fetched from Key Vault via existing secret reference in main.bicep
Whether to enable Advanced Data Security / threat detection (staging + prod only)
Optional firewall IP ranges for dev convenience (empty array in staging/prod)
CORS allowed origins (Static Web Apps domain once known)
Log retention in days (30 dev, 90 staging/prod)
App Service Plan SKU (B2 dev/staging, B3 prod)
Key Vault name for secret references
Application Insights connection string (written to app settings via Key Vault reference by preference, but accepted direct for bootstrap)
Static Web Apps region (eastus2 due to availability — override if needed)
Subnet id for Container Apps environment
Log Analytics workspace id for diagnostics
Container image (placeholder until Story 0.5 ships calc-service image)
Principal id of the managed identity to grant access
Principal id of the managed identity to grant access
